title: Marathon is having a Terrible Launch Already
description:
Bungie's newest game Marathon just released their official 'Server Slam', with over 140k concurrent players on Steam alone at the peak - however, many people who tried the game out already seem to have found a number of issues, resulting in a flood of criticism from the UI elements to the gameplay itself. This all resulting in a largely negative outlook for the future of the game.
